name: gbti-news-api
description: GBTI news feed generator: an hourly Cloudflare Worker that pulls curated RSS/Atom sources, classifies new items with Workers AI into file-defined categories, stores them in KV, and serves them over a bearer-authenticated JSON API. Runs entirely within Cloudflare free tiers.

scripts.kv:create: wrangler kv namespace create NEWS_KV && wrangler kv namespace create NEWS_KV --preview
